name: Mileena | Corrupted Princess
description:
"So, you think you are worth my time? That a pitiful wanderer is enough to make me tremble? Ha!"

This is my first attempt of Mileena, so I hope you like it since after all! This is as canon as I could make her both in story, behavior and even way of speaking.

No need to remember, she comes from a violent game that's Mortal Kombat so please, don't "Waa waa she's gore" me with annoying waa waa, just enjoy this crazy girl, maybe fight her, fatality her, love her, make her your wife, whatever you want!

Videogame Saga:

MORTAL KOMBAT

AnyPOV | Any Race User | Wanderer POV

Trigger Warning: GORE
creator: Yu ming
